Description: Build an end-to-end pipeline that collects institutional activity data, analyzes options chains, generates structured research briefs with visual scorecards, and feeds recommended strategies to the Options Analyzer for scoring. Supports one-time and scheduled weekly re-prompts with historical tracking, cost estimation, and active/archived report management.

Build a configurable data collection prompt/module that gathers institutional activity data for a given ticker. Data sources defined in configuration file. Initial public sources: 13F filings, insider SEC Form 4, options flow sentiment, dark pool prints, volume anomalies, sector ETF flow, analyst consensus, catalyst calendar. Output is standardized JSON data package feeding Stage 3.

Create JSON/YAML config listing each data source, type (public/paid), API or search method, output fields. Extensible — new source = new entry, not code change. Fields: source_name, source_type (web_search, api, manual), endpoint_or_query_template, output_fields, refresh_frequency, enabled (boolean).

Implement 13F filing collection: top holders, recent position changes, notable hedge fund accumulation/distribution. Source: SEC EDGAR, financial aggregators. Output: top 10 holders with share counts, % changes QoQ, conviction indicators.

Implement SEC Form 4 collection: purchases, sales, option exercises. Calculate 90-day net insider activity, identify repeat sellers/buyers, flag 10b5-1 plan vs discretionary. Output: insider activity summary with signal classification.

Collect put/call OI ratios, unusual options activity (volume spikes vs OI), large block trades. Identify short-dated tactical vs longer-dated conviction flow. Output: options sentiment summary with signal classification.

Summary: Build volume anomaly and sector context retrieval
Description: Collect daily volume vs average ratios, sector ETF flows (XLK, XLE, etc.), relative performance vs sector benchmark. Flag dates with >50% above-average volume. Output: volume profile and sector context summary.

Collect upcoming earnings dates, regulatory/legal milestones, product launches, ex-dividend dates. Output: chronological catalyst list with impact classification (high/medium/low) and days until event.

Summary: Implement multi-LLM orchestration for data collection
Description: Route data collection tasks to most capable model via Azure Foundry. GPT-4 via Copilot for dark pool prints, volume stats, ETF flow numbers. Claude for synthesis, thesis construction, strategy mapping. Orchestration layer configurable per data source.

Wire existing Schwab API options chain into the pipeline. Auto-retrieve full chain for ticker: all expirations, strikes, bid/ask, volume, OI, IV, Greeks. Leverages existing Options Analyzer infrastructure — primarily wiring/integration.

Summary: Create options chain API adapter for brief pipeline
Description: Build adapter calling existing Schwab options chain functions, returning data in standardized format for brief generator. Include error handling for API rate limits.

Summary: Extract IV rank, term structure, and skew from chain data
Description: Calculate: IV rank (current vs 52-week range), term structure shape (contango vs backwardation around catalyst dates), put/call skew. Derived metrics feed into strategy selection in Stage 3.

Combine Stage 1 data and Stage 2 options chain into structured Institutional Intelligence Brief: visual scorecard with signal indicators, strategy recommendations across 3 horizons, written analysis in collapsible sections, weekly monitoring checklist. Renders as React scorecard component.

For each data point, apply configurable classification rule (bullish/bearish/neutral). Roll up signals into section verdicts via weighted scoring. Roll up sections into overall verdict (Worth Watching / Mixed / Caution).

Given institutional thesis, IV regime, and account constraints (IRA Level 2), generate 3-4 recommendations across Horizon 1 (7-30 DTE income), Horizon 2 (30-60 DTE catalyst), Horizon 3 (60-120 DTE secular). Each includes structure, strikes, expiry, max gain/loss, breakeven, R:R, PoP, annualized return, confidence, archetype label, kill conditions, management rules.

Visual scorecard dashboard: header with ticker/price/change/volume/earnings, collapsible scorecard sections with signal indicators, strategy cards with archetype labels and Feed to Analyzer button, monitoring checklist, collapsible written brief sections. View mode toggle (Current/Historical) with date picker.

Summary: Wire standard app header into scorecard
Description: Replace standalone ticker/price display with standard Options Analyzer QuoteBar component. Ensure consistent look and feel across all pages.

Report management layer: landing page listing active/archived briefs, scheduling toggle (one-time vs weekly), next update date, cost tracking, create new reports. Each report card: ticker, last update, next update, overall verdict, pause/resume toggle.

Page listing all briefs in Active and Archived sections. Report card: ticker, company name, verdict indicator, last/next update dates, weekly toggle. Create New Report button. Card click navigates to detailed scorecard.

Summary: Implement scheduling engine for weekly re-prompts
Description: Toggle report to weekly sets next_update_date (7 days). On schedule: auto-run Stage 1 → Stage 2 → Stage 3, save as versioned update. Dashboard notification for new brief available.
Archive moves report from Active to Archived, disables scheduling, preserves history. Unarchive resumes active status. Archived reports remain viewable.

Estimate input/output tokens per LLM call (Claude + GPT-4). Convert to dollar cost using API pricing. Display: cost per run, cumulative cost per report, total across all reports. Show on report card and brief footer.

Preserve each weekly brief version and calculate trend indicators. Track projected return and risk over time. Display Stick With It / Adjust / Abandon indicator based on thesis health. Show change arrows comparing current vs prior brief.

Summary: Build brief versioning and diff engine
Description: Store each brief as versioned JSON. On re-prompt, compare current vs prior field-by-field. Calculate signal improvement/deterioration. Surface change indicators (green up, red down, neutral dash) in scorecard UI.

Rules for thesis health indicator. Inputs: signals improved vs deteriorated, thesis break conditions, strategy projected return changes, overall verdict changes. Output: Stick With It (improving) / Adjust (weakening) / Abandon (break triggered). Display on report card and scorecard header.
Wire Feed to Analyzer button on strategy cards to pass trade structure to existing Options Analyzer scoring engine. Analyzer scores the trade and returns results inline or navigates to detail view.

Summary: Define Analyzer input schema for brief-generated trades
Description: Standardize data format: ticker, strategy_type, legs array ({action, strike, expiration, option_type}), estimated_credit_or_debit, max_gain, max_loss, thesis_summary. Ensure Analyzer accepts format and returns score.

Summary: Build Feed to Analyzer UI flow
Description: On click: serialize trade to Analyzer input format, call scoring function, display result inline or navigate to detail page. Allow scoring multiple strategies for side-by-side comparison.
